Mission.name: h_0-1_tas_backrange_bountyhunterreporttotheloa
Mission.Title: Bounty Hunter: Report to the LOA
Mission.Description:
[$emote]Jason looks at you sternly, then turns to scan the screen in front of him.[$/emote]
You're right on schedule. I've been expecting you, [$name].
Since you're just out of the Ark, you've been assigned to [$npc]Jimmy Chrome[$/npc] at the [$inst]L[$/inst]eague of [$inst]O[$/inst]bservation and [$inst]A[$/inst]ccess. Jimmy heads up the branch of the LOA here in Back Range.
The LOA is Hestia's covert ops force. This is where you, as a Bounty Hunter, should aspire to be. You wouldn't last a second out there by the looks of you, so if you hope to join the ranks someday, you'd best start your [$class] training. Head [$loc]north[$/loc] along the road until you find [$loc]Ascent Station.[$/loc]
Mission.NotCompleteText:
You're decreasing my productivity, [$class]. I've got other things to do besides chat with a newcomer like you.
If I waste any more time, I'll have to fill out form 73-A9, in triplicate!
Once you start working for the Company, you'll understand. Efficiency is everything.
Head [$loc]north[$/loc] along the road to [$loc]Ascent Station[$/loc], and [$imp]speak with[$/imp] [$npc]Jimmy Chrome[$/npc] of the FLC.
Mission.CompleteText:
Ah, another [$class], fresh out of the Ark and ready for training.
First things first. I'm Jimmy, and I run the League of Observation and Access in Back Range, otherwise known as the LOA.
It's good to have you here, [$name]. I hope you're ready to work hard.

Objective.name: h_0-1_bountyhunterreporttotheloa_patrol1
Objective.ExternalText: Drive north to Ascent Station and speak with Jimmy Chrome of the League of Observation and Access.
Objective.Title: Report to Jimmy Chrome
Objective.DefaultText: Drive north to Ascent Station and speak with Jimmy Chrome of the League of Observation and Access.

Objective.name: h_0-1_bountyhunterreporttotheloa_deliver1
Objective.ExternalText: Drive north to Ascent Station and speak with Jimmy Chrome of the League of Observation and Access.
Objective.Title: Report to Jimmy Chrome
Objective.DefaultText: Drive north to Ascent Station and speak with Jimmy Chrome of the League of Observation and Access.
